creator: pkubaj@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 200159
patch

Building on GCC architectures after upgrade to GCC8 requires adding -Wno-unused-function -Wno-class-memaccess -Wno-catch-value to CXXFLAGS and -Wno-format-overflow to CFLAGS.

Tested on powerpc64 and amd64.

Hardware sponsored by IntegriCloud.
